news.t: Roundhill Investments Launches Humanoid Robotics ETF (HUMN)

holdings.infoBox: HUMN is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ubtech Robotics Corp stock at 5.72%, Tesla at 5.05%, Hyundai Motor Company at 4.85%, Robotis Co at 4.37%, and Rainbow Robotics at 4.08%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Humanoid Robotics ETF (HUMN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks capital appreciation by actively managing a portfolio of global companies involved in developing and manufacturing humanoid robotics. HUMN was launched on Jun 26, 2025 and is issued by Roundhill.

data.title: Roundhill Investments Launches Humanoid Robotics ETF (HUMN)
data.text: HUMN offers targeted exposure to the humanoid robotics market, which is expected to reach $5 trillion by 2050. NEW YORK , June 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Roundhill Investments, an ETF sponsor focused on...
